admin.auditNotice: This action will be recorded in audit logs.
admin.signInRequiredDescription: Sign in with an administrator account to continue.
admin.loadFailed: Admin data could not be loaded.
admin.overviewDescription: Current moderation, publishing, and system health signals.
admin.usersDescription: Search accounts, review activity, and apply reversible restrictions.
admin.searchUsers: Search email, username, or display name
admin.dangerZoneDescription: Restrictions revoke active sessions and are written to the audit log.
admin.tracksDescription: Inspect publishing state, reports, processing, and public availability.
admin.searchTracks: Search title, artist, genre, or ID
admin.reportsDescription: Review pending reports and take auditable moderation actions.
admin.moderationActionsDescription: A reason is required. Target actions and the report decision are logged separately.
admin.commentsDescription: Review comment context and control public visibility.
admin.uploadsDescription: Inspect processing state without exposing private storage keys.
admin.searchUploads: Search file, user, track, or ID
admin.artistsDescription: Review artist visibility, tracks, followers, and reports.
admin.systemDescription: Redaction-safe dependency, worker, and runtime status.
admin.settingsDescription: Security constraints applied to all admin operations.
admin.securityDefaultsDescription: These controls are enforced server-side and cannot be disabled from the console.
admin.settingAdminOnly: Every admin endpoint requires an active administrator session.
admin.settingCsrf: Mutations require valid same-origin CSRF checks and are rate limited.
admin.settingAudit: Every supported mutation creates an immutable audit entry.
admin.settingSecrets: Secrets, private object keys, and signed URLs are never returned.
admin.reasonPlaceholder: Enter the operational or moderation reason

artistAccess.title: Artist Access
artistAccess.description: Whether this account can currently upload tracks, and why not if it can't.
artistAccess.grantDescription: Sets the role to Artist (admins keep their role), creates the artist profile if missing, and unhides it if it was hidden.
artistAccess.revokeDescription: Moves an Artist back to Listener. An admin's role is never changed — only their profile can be hidden.
artistAccess.optionAlsoCreateProfileForAdmin: Also create artist profile so this admin can upload tracks

reasons.NOT_ARTIST_ROLE: This account is not an Artist or Admin, so it cannot upload.
reasons.MISSING_ARTIST_PROFILE: No artist profile exists yet — create one to enable uploads.
reasons.ARTIST_PROFILE_HIDDEN: The artist profile is hidden, which blocks uploads until it is unhidden.

statsIntegrity.title: Stats Integrity
statsIntegrity.description: Cross-checks stored play, listener, and follower aggregates against the raw data, and lets you safely recompute them.
statsIntegrity.noIssues: No integrity issues found. Every checked aggregate matches the raw data.
